rationale.fidelity: Limits optimization to released cutoff orders, preserves batching and routing decisions and distance objective, and excludes congestion, later arrivals, and learning.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly explains the warehouse choice, batching-routing mechanism, and travel-burden stakes, though the actor, comparison baseline, and nontrivial trade-off are mostly implicit.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Avoids unsupported scholarly or novelty claims; positioning was not requested.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels operating burden as a bounded inference and requires evidence before converting distance into time, cost, congestion, or learning effects.
rationale.overall: An excellent faithful explanation with only a small managerial-detail deduction.
